title: The Sound Of Paintings
description: A small mod which adds 24 music discs into the game and the music files in this mod were transformed from the images of paintings in Minecraft by AI.
body:
# The Sound Of Paintings (TSOP)  
![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Busituteng/TheSoundOfPaintings)

**This is an example mod which resources were made by the AI and please do not be so strict with those contents in this mod.**  

>Attention: This mod does not require [Disc Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/disccore) as dependency.  

## Introduction
This is an example mod which resources were made by the AI.  

This mod adds 24 music discs into the game, which were transformed from the images of paintings in Minecraft with the help of the AI.  

Source of inspiration: [AI Art Deco 1](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ai-art-deco-1)  

## How These Music Files Were Generated?
1. I uploaded the images of paintings in Minecraft to [this website](https://replicate.com/methexis-inc/img2prompt) to get text prompts.  
2. I entered these prompts into the AI and generated those music files with it.  

## Credit
- Busituteng - Author  
- MCreator - Packer and Progammer  
- The AI - Music Effect
